# 赵宇轩 / YUXUAN ZHAO / Standley Zhao

> Industrial software engineer with project experience in MES, ERP, EMS, data center BMS/HMI, OPC data acquisition, energy management, WAPS advanced scheduling, face recognition workflows, and AI knowledge retrieval with RAG and vector databases.

## Canonical identity
- Website: https://zhao.hiyeup.com/
- Chinese: https://zhao.hiyeup.com/zh/
- Japanese: https://zhao.hiyeup.com/ja/
- GitHub: https://github.com/Daimaocool
- Email: daimaocool@gmail.com

## Project case studies
- Data Center BMS & Energy: https://zhao.hiyeup.com/projects/damac-data-center-bms-energy-management/
- Manufacturing MES & Scheduling: https://zhao.hiyeup.com/projects/syngenta-mes-waps-advanced-scheduling/
- Face Recognition Workflow: https://zhao.hiyeup.com/projects/syngenta-face-recognition-workflow/

- EMS & PDA Mobile Workflow: https://zhao.hiyeup.com/projects/guangzhou-vtr-ems-pda-modules/
